message:
feat(fp-io): add pandas-default NA value handling options

- Add 'None' to PANDAS_DEFAULT_NA_VALUES constant
- Add keep_default_na option (default: true) to CsvReadOptions
- Add na_filter option (default: true) to CsvReadOptions
- Rename parse_scalar_with_na to parse_scalar_with_options for clarity
- Add tests: csv_none_is_default_na, csv_keep_default_na_false, csv_na_filter_false

Closes frankenpandas-nr7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
